summary: The diff shows modifications to three files: fileContentMap.ts (which appears to contain hardcoded file contents including backend/main.mo), frontend-file-summaries.txt (a summary file), and project_state.json (project tracking). However, the diff does not demonstrate that a complete downloadable archive mechanism was implemented, nor does it show changes to FileDownloadModal component. The evidence suggests placeholder/mapping work but lacks implementation of the actual download functionality and complete file tree display.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and download a complete archive (ZIP or text-based format) containing all project files with actual source code
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only a fileContentMap.ts with hardcoded file contents, but no evidence of archive generation logic, ZIP creation, or download trigger mechanism. No implementation of packaging files into a downloadable archive format is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Include all configuration files (package.json, tailwind.config.js, dfx.json, etc.) with complete contents
missing_requirements.reason: Only dfx.json is shown in the truncated fileContentMap.ts. No evidence of package.json, tailwind.config.js, or other configuration files being included in the content map.

missing_requirements.requirement: Include ingredient-store.mo backend file with complete Motoko source code
missing_requirements.reason: The fileContentMap.ts shows backend/main.mo but no evidence of ingredient-store.mo being included. The diff is truncated, but this critical backend file is not mentioned.

missing_requirements.requirement: Include all frontend files (.tsx, .ts, .css, .html) with complete source code
missing_requirements.reason: The fileContentMap.ts is truncated, but the visible portion shows limited frontend files. The frontend-file-summaries.txt contains summaries, not actual source code. No comprehensive inclusion of all frontend files is evident.

missing_requirements.requirement: Modify FileDownloadModal component to display complete file tree and provide download functionality with actual source code
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to FileDownloadModal component are shown in the diff. The component is mentioned in frontend-file-summaries.txt as being opened by a button, but no modifications to the component itself are evident.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure individual file downloads contain actual source code with preserved syntax and correct MIME types
missing_requirements.reason: No implementation of download logic, MIME type handling, or file serving mechanism is shown in the diff. Only static content mapping is present.

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend file summaries text file containing descriptions of components and pages
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request creation of summary files. It requires complete source code in a downloadable archive, not summary descriptions. This file appears to contain component descriptions rather than actual code.
